ddls:
CREATE TABLE "chapters" (
  "chapter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chapter */,
  "chapter_name" TEXT /* Name of the chapter */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the chapter */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the chapter */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the chapter was established */,
  "chapter_description" TEXT /* Description of the chapter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chapter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awardees" (
  "awardee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each awardee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the awardee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the awardee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the awardee */,
  "member_since" TEXT /* Date the awardee became a member */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the awardee */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the awardee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("awardee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "award_committee" (
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee */,
  "committee_name" TEXT /* Name of the committee */,
  "chairperson" TEXT /* Name of the chairperson */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the committee */,
  "term_start" TEXT /* Start date of the committee term */,
  "term_end" TEXT /* End date of the committee term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "chapter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the chapter that gave the award */,
  "awardee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the awardee */,
  "award_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the award type */,
  "year_of_award" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "presentation_date" TEXT /* Date the award was presented */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_chapter_id FOREIGN KEY ("chapter_id") REFERENCES chapters ("chapter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_awardee_id FOREIGN KEY ("awardee_id") REFERENCES awardees ("awardee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nominations" (
  "nomination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nomination */,
  "awardee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the awardee being nominated */,
  "award_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award type being nominated for */,
  "nominator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nominator */,
  "nomination_date" TEXT /* Date the nomination was made */,
  "nomination_status" TEXT /* Status of the nomination (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "nomination_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the nomination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nomination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominations_awardee_id FOREIGN KEY ("awardee_id") REFERENCES awardees ("awardee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, chapter leader, awardee) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "award_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award history entry */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award */,
  "awardee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the awardee */,
  "year_of_award" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "presentation_date" TEXT /* Date the award was presented */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_history_awardee_id FOREIGN KEY ("awardee_id") REFERENCES awardees ("awardee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_history_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chapter_leaders" (
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chapter leader */,
  "chapter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chapter the leader is associated with */,
  "leader_name" TEXT /* Name of the chapter leader */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the chapter leader */,
  "term_start" TEXT /* Start date of the leader's term */,
  "term_end" TEXT /* End date of the leader's term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leader_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chapter_leaders_chapter_id FOREIGN KEY ("chapter_id") REFERENCES chapters ("chapter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award associated with the notification */,
  "awardee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the awardee associated with the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., award announcement, nomination reminder) */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_awardee_id FOREIGN KEY ("awardee_id") REFERENCES awardees ("awardee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
